summary: Results-driven Senior Full Stack Engineer (6+ years) with proven expertise in building and leading cloud-native microservice architectures using Java/Spring Boot, NodeJS/NestJS, MEAN/MERN stack and React/Angular. Experienced across Telecom, FinTech, GovTech, and EdTech domains with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and automation. Skilled in AWS Cloud, CI/CD pipelines, and system observability. Passionate about mentoring teams and driving full lifecycle delivery of enterprise-grade software that improves efficiency and customer experience.

testimonials.name: Sudeep Dutta
testimonials.title: Senior Product Engineer @ iPaySmart | React Hooks, APIs
testimonials.relationship: Sudeep reported to Kishore Kumar directly
testimonials.content: Highly skilled and experienced Software Engineer with a demonstrated track record of delivering complex software solutions for a diverse range of clients. Proficient in a wide range of programming languages, frameworks, and tools. Adept at leading development teams, providing technical guidance and mentorship, and driving project success. Experienced in architecting scalable and resilient systems that meet business requirements and user needs. A results-oriented problem-solver with excellent analytical and communication skills, and a strong commitment to continuous learning and professional development.

testimonials.name: Abhinav Dhingra
testimonials.title: Product Manager | Transforming ideas into profitable products through agile methodologies and cross-functional collaboration.
testimonials.relationship: Abhinav was senior to Kishore Kumar but didn't manage Kishore Kumar directly
testimonials.content: Kishore has a solid background in full-stack development and has demonstrated exceptional proficiency in a range of programming languages, including JavaScript and Python. He has a thorough understanding of front-end development technologies such as React and Angular as well as back-end frameworks such as Node.js and Nest.js. What sets Kishore apart from others is his ability to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams and work in an agile environment. He has a deep understanding of design patterns and is well-versed in designing and implementing microservices architecture for web applications. I wholeheartedly recommend Kishore for the Full Stack Software Engineer position.

testimonials.name: Mohit Sharma
testimonials.title: Senior Product Manager (PM II) | Marketplace & Platform Products | Logistics & Fintech
testimonials.relationship: Mohit worked with Kishore Kumar on the same team
testimonials.content: Kishore Sharma is an accomplished Software Engineer with a proven history of delivering sophisticated software solutions to a variety of clients. His proficiency spans across several programming languages, frameworks, and tools. He has a talent for leading development teams, providing technical guidance and mentorship, and ensuring project success. He has extensive experience in designing adaptable and robust systems that meet both business objectives and user requirements. He is a results-driven problem-solver with exceptional analytical and communication skills and a steadfast commitment to ongoing learning and career advancement.

testimonials.name: Gautam Sharma
testimonials.title: Technical Architect at LTIMindtree | Ex-Policybazaar | Ex-CarDekho
testimonials.content: A skilled software developer with a keen interest in constructing efficient, creative, and user-friendly applications. Knowledgeable in various programming languages and frameworks, with a specific specialization in Full stack development. Dedicated to continuous education and professional advancement, keeping current with the most recent industry developments and finest practices. A team player who collaborates well, providing exceptional work and exceeding client expectations.

testimonials.name: Kundan Kumar Sharma
testimonials.title: Senior QA Automation Engineer at Wizni | Cypress, Selenium & Java | AI & LLM Testing (RAG/MCP) | CI/CD & Docker | Remote | Ex-Cognizant
testimonials.relationship: Kundan Kumar worked with Kishore Kumar but on different teams
testimonials.content: He's very enthusiastic and motivated. He always keep learning in order to be a better version of himself. He has indepth knowledge of JavaScript and its framework like React, Angular and Node. He even has knowledge of mobile app development using React Native. Apart from these, he's very cool person.

testimonials.name: Manish Dhoundiyal
testimonials.title: Product Manager || Product Development || Technology || Fintech || Edtech || E-commerce
testimonials.relationship: Manish was senior to Kishore Kumar but didn't manage Kishore Kumar directly
testimonials.content: He possesses both a strong work ethic and strategic thinking abilities, making him a smart and reliable team member. Additionally, I must commend his exceptional leadership skills, which were particularly impressive to me during our time working together.

testimonials.name: Shailendra Singh
testimonials.title: Software Engineering
testimonials.relationship: Shailendra was senior to Kishore Kumar but didn't manage Kishore Kumar directly
testimonials.content: Genuine person with sound technical skills, a true team player and hungry for learning new technical skills.

testimonials.relationship: Pragyan deep worked with Kishore Kumar on the same team
testimonials.content: I have worked with kishore kumar and I would definitely like to say he is an asset to any team. He is not only a hard working guy but also a smart worker too. It will be incomplete to define him without praising his leadership skills. That was the thing I loved the most about him when I used to work with him.
